code-analysis.description: Static analysis, complexity metrics, code search, and F# structural checks. All read-only operations with no side effects.

tools.name: analyze_code
tools.description: Analyze source code for patterns, quality, and structure

tools.name: analyze_file_complexity
tools.description: Compute cyclomatic and cognitive complexity metrics for a file

tools.name: codebase_stats
tools.description: Gather aggregate statistics about a codebase (lines, files, languages)

tools.name: compare_files
tools.description: Diff two files and report structural or textual differences

tools.name: count_lines
tools.description: Count lines of code, comments, and blanks in a file or directory

tools.name: explore_project
tools.description: Discover project structure, entry points, and dependencies

tools.name: extract_symbols
tools.description: Extract function, type, and module symbols from source code

tools.name: find_code_smells
tools.description: Detect code smells such as long methods, god classes, and feature envy

tools.name: find_duplicates
tools.description: Identify duplicate or near-duplicate code blocks

tools.name: find_similar_code
tools.description: Find code segments structurally similar to a given snippet

tools.name: find_todos
tools.description: Search for TODO, FIXME, HACK, and other marker comments

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search code by pattern, regex, or semantic query

tools.name: search_codebase
tools.description: Full-text search across an entire codebase with filtering

tools.name: fsharp_analyze_structure
tools.description: Analyze F# module structure, type hierarchy, and dependency graph

tools.name: fsharp_check_file_order
tools.description: Validate F# file ordering constraints in project files

tools.name: fsharp_check_syntax
tools.description: Check F# source for syntax errors without compiling

tools.name: analyze_dependencies
tools.description: Analyze project dependency graph and detect circular references

tools.name: analyze_type_usage
tools.description: Analyze how types are used across a codebase to find patterns

fsharp-language.description: F# compilation, evaluation, computation expression templates, and error diagnostics. Medium risk due to code execution side effects.

tools.name: fsharp_compile
tools.description: Compile F# source to assembly, reporting errors and warnings

tools.name: fsharp_eval
tools.description: Evaluate F# expressions in an interactive session

tools.name: fsharp_ce_template
tools.description: Generate F# computation expression builder templates

tools.name: fsharp_explain_error
tools.description: Explain an F# compiler error with context and suggested fixes

tools.name: fsharp_suggest_fix
tools.description: Suggest code fixes for F# compiler errors or warnings

tools.name: fsharp_format
tools.description: Format F# source code according to style conventions

tools.name: fsharp_type_info
tools.description: Retrieve type information for F# expressions and bindings

grammar-dsl.description: Grammar creation, weighting, updates, and metascript parsing for DSL-driven workflows. Medium risk due to state mutation.

tools.name: create_grammar
tools.description: Create a new probabilistic grammar from a specification

tools.name: grammar_weights
tools.description: Get or set production rule weights in a grammar

tools.name: grammar_update
tools.description: Update grammar rules or structure in place

tools.name: parse_metascript
tools.description: Parse a TARS metascript into an executable plan AST

tools.name: create_metascript
tools.description: Author a new TARS metascript from a high-level specification

tools.name: grammar_validate
tools.description: Validate a grammar for consistency, completeness, and reachability

tools.name: grammar_sample
tools.description: Sample productions from a grammar with weighted randomness

knowledge-research.description: Fetch and search external knowledge sources. Read-only with no local side effects.

tools.name: fetch_arxiv
tools.description: Fetch paper metadata and abstracts from arXiv by query or ID

tools.name: fetch_github_readme
tools.description: Fetch the README content from a GitHub repository

tools.name: fetch_json_api
tools.description: Fetch and parse JSON from a REST API endpoint

tools.name: fetch_webpage
tools.description: Fetch and extract readable content from a web page

tools.name: fetch_wikipedia
tools.description: Fetch Wikipedia article content by title or search query

tools.name: search_semantic_scholar
tools.description: Search Semantic Scholar for academic papers with citation data

tools.name: search_web
tools.description: Perform a web search and return ranked results

tools.name: lookup_docs
tools.description: Look up documentation for a library, API, or language feature

tools.name: get_codebase_context
tools.description: Retrieve contextual information about a codebase for grounding

tools.name: fetch_doi
tools.description: Fetch paper metadata from a DOI identifier

tools.name: fetch_rss
tools.description: Fetch and parse an RSS or Atom feed for latest entries

knowledge-graph.description: Build and query knowledge graphs. Medium risk due to persistent state mutation.

tools.name: graph_add_node
tools.description: Add a typed node to the knowledge graph

tools.name: graph_add_edge
tools.description: Add a typed relationship edge between two graph nodes

tools.name: graph_export_json
tools.description: Export the knowledge graph or a subgraph as JSON

tools.name: graph_find_contradictions
tools.description: Detect contradictory assertions in the knowledge graph

tools.name: graph_get_neighborhood
tools.description: Retrieve the local neighborhood of a node within N hops

tools.name: graph_query
tools.description: Query the knowledge graph with pattern matching or traversal

tools.name: graph_remove_node
tools.description: Remove a node and its edges from the knowledge graph

tools.name: graph_merge_nodes
tools.description: Merge two equivalent nodes, combining their edges

tools.name: save_note
tools.description: Save a structured note to persistent memory

tools.name: tars_memory_op
tools.description: Perform CRUD operations on TARS persistent memory store

agent-persona.description: Agent lifecycle management — status checks, prompt creation, skill registration, task delegation. Medium risk due to agent spawning.

tools.name: agent_status
tools.description: Query the status and health of a running agent

tools.name: create_agent_prompt
tools.description: Generate a system prompt for an agent from persona and context

tools.name: create_skill
tools.description: Register a new skill in the TARS skill registry

tools.name: delegate_task
tools.description: Delegate a task to a subordinate agent with context

tools.name: query_agent
tools.description: Send a query to an agent and receive a structured response

tools.name: search_skills_registry
tools.description: Search the skill registry by name, capability, or tag

tools.name: agent_spawn
tools.description: Spawn a new agent instance with a given persona and task

tools.name: agent_terminate
tools.description: Terminate a running agent instance gracefully

code-generation-refactoring.description: Write, patch, refactor, and build code. High risk due to filesystem mutations and potential for introducing defects.

tools.name: write_code
tools.description: Generate source code from a specification or description

tools.name: patch_code
tools.description: Apply a targeted patch to existing source code

tools.name: refactor_add_documentation
tools.description: Add XML doc comments and inline documentation to code

tools.name: refactor_extract_function
tools.description: Extract a code block into a named function

tools.name: refactor_inline_value
tools.description: Inline a variable or constant at all usage sites

tools.name: refactor_remove_dead_code
tools.description: Identify and remove unreachable or unused code

tools.name: refactor_rename_symbol
tools.description: Rename a symbol across all references in the codebase

tools.name: build_project
tools.description: Build a project using its configured build system

tools.name: create_block
tools.description: Create a reusable code block template

tools.name: create_dynamic_tool
tools.description: Create a new MCP tool at runtime from a specification — self-extension capability

tools.name: scaffold_project
tools.description: Generate project scaffolding from a template

tools.name: refactor_extract_module
tools.description: Extract related functions and types into a new module

testing.description: Test generation, execution, and tool validation. Medium risk due to test execution side effects.

tools.name: generate_test
tools.description: Generate unit or property-based tests for a function or module

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Execute test suites and report pass/fail results

tools.name: test_tool
tools.description: Run validation tests against a specific MCP tool

tools.name: validate_tool
tools.description: Validate a tool's schema, inputs, and outputs against its contract

tools.name: generate_property_test
tools.description: Generate property-based (FsCheck/QuickCheck) tests from type signatures

tools.name: test_coverage
tools.description: Analyze test coverage and report uncovered code paths

git-version-control.description: Git operations and GitHub integration. High risk due to irreversible commit history mutations.

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Stage and commit changes with a structured commit message

tools.name: github_repo
tools.description: Query GitHub repository metadata, issues, and pull requests

tools.name: update_readme
tools.description: Update a repository README with generated content

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Show staged or unstaged changes as a unified diff

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show commit history with filtering and formatting options

tools.name: git_branch
tools.description: Create, list, or switch branches

document-prompt.description: Document generation, prompt engineering, and schema.org markup. Low risk — produces output without modifying existing state.

tools.name: generate_docs
tools.description: Generate documentation from source code or specifications

tools.name: write_document
tools.description: Write a structured document from a template and content

tools.name: list_document_templates
tools.description: List available document templates by category

tools.name: improve_prompt
tools.description: Analyze and improve a prompt for clarity and effectiveness

tools.name: schema_org
tools.description: Generate schema.org structured data markup

tools.name: summarize_document
tools.description: Generate a structured summary of a long document

reasoning-planning.description: Structured reasoning, reflection, planning, and debugging aids. Medium risk due to influence on downstream decision-making.

tools.name: think_step_by_step
tools.description: Decompose a problem into explicit reasoning steps

tools.name: reflect_on_task
tools.description: Generate a structured reflection on task progress and quality

tools.name: plan_task
tools.description: Create an execution plan for a multi-step task

tools.name: request_review
tools.description: Request a structured review of work from another agent or human

tools.name: debug_hint
tools.description: Generate debugging hints for a described problem

tools.name: trace_error
tools.description: Trace an error through the call stack and suggest root cause

tools.name: evaluate_options
tools.description: Evaluate multiple options against weighted criteria

tools.name: pre_mortem
tools.description: Conduct a pre-mortem analysis identifying likely failure modes

workflow-automation.description: Shell execution, file downloads, HTTP requests, and environment access. High risk due to arbitrary system access.

tools.name: run_shell
tools.description: Execute an arbitrary shell command and capture output

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Download a file from a URL to a local path

tools.name: http_get
tools.description: Perform an HTTP GET request and return the response

tools.name: get_env
tools.description: Read environment variables from the host system

tools.name: measure_time
tools.description: Measure wall-clock execution time of an operation

tools.name: http_post
tools.description: Perform an HTTP POST request with a body payload

tools.name: watch_directory
tools.description: Watch a directory for file changes and report events

temporal-logic.description: Temporal reasoning — contradiction detection, history tracking, and evolution tracing across time. Read-only analysis.

tools.name: temporal_detect_contradictions
tools.description: Detect temporal contradictions in a sequence of assertions

tools.name: temporal_get_history
tools.description: Retrieve the temporal history of an entity or assertion

tools.name: temporal_trace_evolution
tools.description: Trace how a concept or belief evolved over time

tools.name: temporal_project_trend
tools.description: Project a trend forward based on historical data points

tools.name: temporal_snapshot
tools.description: Capture a point-in-time snapshot of an entity's state

resilience.description: Circuit breakers, retry policies, and caching for fault-tolerant operations. Medium risk due to state management.

tools.name: circuit_breaker
tools.description: Apply circuit breaker pattern to an operation with failure thresholds

tools.name: retry_with_backoff
tools.description: Retry a failed operation with exponential backoff

tools.name: cache_set
tools.description: Store a value in the cache with optional TTL

tools.name: cache_get
tools.description: Retrieve a value from the cache by key

tools.name: cache_invalidate
tools.description: Invalidate a cache entry or pattern of entries

monitoring.description: Metrics recording and action logging for observability. Low risk — append-only telemetry.

tools.name: record_metric
tools.description: Record a named metric value with timestamp and labels

tools.name: log_action
tools.description: Log a structured action event for audit trail

tools.name: get_metrics
tools.description: Query recorded metrics with time range and label filters

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Run health checks on system components and report status

mcp-management.description: Discover, configure, and install MCP servers. Medium risk due to server configuration changes.

tools.name: list_mcp_servers
tools.description: List all configured MCP servers and their connection status

tools.name: configure_mcp_server
tools.description: Update configuration for an MCP server connection

tools.name: install_mcp_server
tools.description: Install and register a new MCP server

tools.name: search_mcp_servers
tools.description: Search for available MCP servers by capability or name

llm-management.description: Pull and switch between LLM models. Medium risk due to resource and behavior implications.

tools.name: pull_model
tools.description: Download an LLM model to local storage

tools.name: switch_model
tools.description: Switch the active LLM model for inference

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List available LLM models with size and capability metadata

self-extension.description: Runtime self-modification through dynamic tool creation. Critical risk — enables unbounded capability expansion.

tools.name: create_dynamic_tool
tools.description: Create a new MCP tool at runtime from a specification — self-extension capability. Also listed under code-generation-refactoring.

tools.name: promote_tool
tools.description: Promote a dynamic tool to permanent status after governance review

wot-plan-execution.description: Web-of-Thought plan compilation, step execution, validation, and completion. High risk due to multi-step autonomous execution.

tools.name: tars_compile_plan
tools.description: Compile a high-level plan into executable WoT steps

tools.name: tars_execute_step
tools.description: Execute a single step in a compiled WoT plan

tools.name: tars_validate_step
tools.description: Validate the output of a WoT plan step against expectations

tools.name: tars_complete_plan
tools.description: Finalize and close a WoT plan execution with summary

symbolic.description: Symbolic reflection and reasoning tools for introspection and meta-cognitive operations. Low risk — observational only.

tools.name: symbolic_reflect
tools.description: Perform symbolic reflection on a concept or decision

tools.name: symbolic_decompose
tools.description: Decompose a complex concept into symbolic primitives

tools.name: symbolic_compose
tools.description: Compose symbolic primitives into higher-order concepts

tools.name: symbolic_evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate a symbolic expression in a given context

tools.name: symbolic_transform
tools.description: Apply a transformation rule to a symbolic expression

tools.name: symbolic_unify
tools.description: Attempt to unify two symbolic expressions with substitution

tools.name: symbolic_pattern_match
tools.description: Match a symbolic expression against a pattern template

tools.name: symbolic_rewrite
tools.description: Apply rewrite rules to normalize or simplify expressions

tools.name: symbolic_type_check
tools.description: Type-check a symbolic expression against a type system

tools.name: symbolic_prove
tools.description: Attempt to prove a symbolic proposition using available axioms

tools.name: symbolic_abstract
tools.description: Abstract concrete values into symbolic variables

tools.name: symbolic_instantiate
tools.description: Instantiate symbolic variables with concrete values

augment.description: Augmented codebase search with semantic understanding. Low risk — read-only search enhancement.

tools.name: augment_codebase_search
tools.description: Semantic search across a codebase using natural language queries

notes: create_dynamic_tool appears in both code-generation-refactoring and self-extension categories — counted once for totals
All 13 departments have >= 5 applicable tools — no coverage gaps
Critical-risk tools (create_dynamic_tool, promote_tool) require pre-mortem gate — governance review before execution
Grammar tools are universally applicable across all departments due to DSL-driven pedagogy
151 unique tools across 21 categories; risk distribution favors low-risk (read-only) tools
Departments with broadest coverage: computer-science (126), mathematics (45), product-management (40), psychohistory (40)
